title: Peristylus gracillimus
taxonomy: Peristylus gracillimus is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Peristylus gracillimus is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary and genetic relationships with other orchids. The species is further classified within the genus Peristylus.
